code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut total = 0
  mut stop = false
  for p in parts
    if not stop
      match string.parse_int(p)
      when Some(n)
        if total + n > 100
          stop = true
        else
          total = total + n
        end
      when None
        stop = stop
      end
    end
  end
  print("total=#{total}")
when None
  print("total=0")
end
